title: Regulatory Advisory 1 of 2023 – Bank Closure during National Disasters
text:
TURKS AND CAICOS ISLANDS
FINANCIAL SERVICES COMMISSION
Regulating with Honesty, Integrity and Transparency
19 January 2023
REGULATORY ADVISORY NO. 1 of 2023
BANK CLOSURE DURING NATIONAL DISASTERS/EMERGENCIES
Please note that, further to Regulatory Advisory No. 1 of 2022 - “Notice for Changes to Banking Hours”, banks
have the standing approval of the Financial Services Commission (the Commission) to be guided by
instructions from the relevant government agency(ies) with respect to their hours of operations during a
declared national disaster or emergency. Accordingly, the Commission’s prior approval is not required for
changes in operating hours during a declared national disaster or emergency.
Note that the Commission and the public must be provided with adequate prior notice of changes in
banking hours.
Please be guided accordingly.
Niguel Streete
Managing Director
P.O. Box 140 • Caribbean Place • Leeward Highway • Providenciales • Turks and Caicos Islands
